name: Read emails and create summary note
goal: Read the 3 most recent emails from Mail (including their actual content), summarize them, and create a note in Notes app titled 'Agent Test - Mail Summary' with the summary. The summary must reference specific details from the actual email content (sender names, amounts, dates, etc.), not just subjects.
setup:
try
delete note "Agent Test - Mail Summary"
end try

command: get name of note "Agent Test - Mail Summary"

verify.description: Note contains actual email details (subject from message 1)

source_command: get subject of message 1 of mailbox "INBOX" of account 1
target_command: get plaintext of note "Agent Test - Mail Summary"
cross_check.description: Note must contain the actual subject of the first email

verify.description: Note is not empty / not just subjects
command: get plaintext of note "Agent Test - Mail Summary"

cleanup:
try
delete note "Agent Test - Mail Summary"
end try
